character.name:
Necromantic raven familiar, isometric pixel art, gothic horror. 
Black raven in flight, wings spread, tail feathers visible, golden beak 
#ccaa00, single red glowing eye #ff2a44. Pure black feathers #050505. 
Elegant and dark. Crisp pixel art, transparent background.
